description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine three_wnd_impedance_data,three_wnd_winding_data, and is implemented by a call to three_wnd_impedance_data,three_wnd_winding_data. Use this API to modify the data of an existing three-winding transformer in the working case or to add a new three-winding transformer to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, realaro = three_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realari, name)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = three_winding_data(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realari, name)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number one of the other buses. (input).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of forty one elementsNone. (input).

intgar.description: SICOD1, negative for controlled bus on winding one side.
COD1, adjustment control mode flag (-3 through +3).
CM, magnetizing admittance data I/O code.
NMETBS, non-metered end bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS).
WN1BUS, winding one side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS).
WN2BUS, winding two side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS).
WN3BUS, winding three side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS).

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
invalid CW, CZ and/or CM value.
CW, CZ and/or CM >1 but no base voltage at one or more buses.
three different buses must be specified.
circuit identifier may not start with ‘&’.
not enough branch table entries available.
not enough room in two winding transformer table.
not enough room in branch ownership table.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

warnings - one or more of: - Invalid set of winding buses. - Invalid transformer status. - Invalid non-metered end bus. - Winding side buses interchanged. - Losses are too big relative to total impedance at winding base MVA. - Magnitude of winding impedance is less than 0.00001. - Controlled bus not found. - Invalid adjustment control mode flag. - Any two-winding transformer warnings.
